CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Continued To Mar-22-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 514; Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:36:19 a.m. and concluding at 09:40:47 a.m.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau represented by Melanie L. Anderson, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Iron Man Moving, Inc. AKA Iron Man Moving Inc not appearing.

LUTHER JAO is placed under oath.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents offer of proof.
LUTHER JAO is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff's witness and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditor's Adjustment Bureau, Inc. and against Defendant Iron Man Moving, Inc. AKA Iron Man Moving Inc, as follows:

1. Principal: $39,462.99
2. Prejudgment Interest: $4,129.42
3. Costs: $570.07
4. Attorney Fees: $1,200.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $38,362.48

Proposed judgment to be submitted.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Continued To Jan-18-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Continued To Oct-19-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
